=====================================
Simple import
=====================================

import Lean

---

(module
  (import
    module: (identifier)))

=====================================
Dotted import path
=====================================

import LeanPrism.Protocol

---

(module
  (import
    module: (projection
      term: (identifier)
      name: (identifier))))

=====================================
Deep nested import path
=====================================

import LeanPrism.SemanticTableau.InfoTreeParser

---

(module
  (import
    module: (projection
      term: (projection
        term: (identifier)
        name: (identifier))
      name: (identifier))))

=====================================
Multiple imports
=====================================

import Lean
import LeanPrism.Protocol
import LeanPrism.SemanticTableau.InfoTreeParser

---

(module
  (import
    module: (identifier))
  (import
    module: (projection
      term: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)))
  (import
    module: (projection
      term: (projection
        term: (identifier)
        name: (identifier))
      name: (identifier))))
